title: Image/GIF button popover, send/voice button swap in chat input

requirements.text: Move the image/GIF button inside the chat input field on the left side. When clicked, it should open a floating popover/modal overlay anchored above the chat input (not a dropdown) that contains image upload and GIF picker options.

quotes: add the image/gif button back inside the chat input (left side) and when it's active make it dropdown
Popover/Modal overlay — A floating panel that appears above the input with image/GIF options

acceptanceCriteria: Image/GIF button is rendered inside the chat input container on the left side
Clicking the button opens a floating popover/modal panel positioned above the chat input
The popover contains image upload and GIF search/picker options (matching existing functionality in MessageInput.tsx)
Clicking outside the popover or pressing Escape closes it
The popover does not use a dropdown pattern

requirements.text: Show the voice message button by default on the right side of the chat input. When the chat input becomes active (focused or has text), hide the voice button and show the send button in its place. When the input loses focus and is empty, swap back to the voice button.

quotes: don't show the send button unless the chat input is active (make it swap the voice message button)
Send button — Hidden by default, swaps in place of the voice button when the chat input is active/focused
Voice button — Shown by default, hidden when the input is active

acceptanceCriteria: Voice message button is visible by default when the chat input is not focused and empty
Send button is hidden by default
When the chat input is focused, the voice button is hidden and the send button appears in the same position
When the input loses focus and contains no text, the send button hides and the voice button reappears
If the input has text and loses focus, the send button remains visible
The swap is visually smooth (e.g., transition or instant swap)

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve all existing image upload and GIF picker functionality — only the trigger/container changes
The popover must be anchored to the image/GIF button and appear above the chat input, not obstruct the message list unnecessarily
nonGoals: Adding new image or GIF picker functionality beyond what already exists
Changes to the voice recording logic or playback
Emoji picker or other additional input actions
